CustomField.description: Used to signify if an applicant is a backup for a specific Property. Manually checked on new Service Files for backup applicants during the morning review of the "Certifications for AA" report. (If the applicant becomes first in line for their unit, the field is unchecked at that point).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check if this applicant is a backup for a Property. Remember to uncheck if they become first in line.
CustomField.label: Backup
